items.titolo: I turned on notification summaries on my Pixel 9 Pro, and it was less chaotic than expected
items.descrizione: Your Pixel can show AI summaries of your notifications on the lock screen now - but there are a few caveats, including a potential privacy issue.

items.titolo: Micron enters high-volume production of HBM4 for Nvidia Vera Rubin - 2.3x bandwidth improvement and 20% boost in power efficiency
items.descrizione: The HBM4 36GB 12H stack runs at over 11 Gb/s pin speeds, delivering bandwidth greater than 2.8 TB/s.

items.titolo: Nvidia wants to own your AI data center from end to end
